postings.title: TKO Group Holdings AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
postings.evidence: This is an AI tracker/research page about TKO's AI initiatives, not a job posting for a specific role.

postings.title: Michael Darling
postings.evidence: Senior Director, Data & AI Enablement at TKO. Built WWE's first AI use case via Slack chatbot; led UFC Fighter biometrics initiatives.

postings.title: John Thomas
postings.evidence: Lead Data Product Manager - Data & AI Products & Services at TKO. Turning AI into real business impact across UFC, WWE, PBR, IMG.

postings.title: Daniel Miller
postings.evidence: Senior Procurement Manager at TKO. Role focuses on sourcing strategy, cost savings, and stakeholder engagement—no AI component.
